allow: Bash(gcloud run deploy business-strategy-api --source . --project velocitycso --region us-central1 --quiet)

Bash(gcloud run services describe business-strategy-api --region us-central1 --project velocitycso --format='value\(status.latestReadyRevisionName,status.url\)')
Bash(pip3 install matplotlib seaborn numpy networkx pandas Pillow --quiet)

Bash(gcloud run services describe business-strategy-api --project velocitycso --region us-central1 --format="value\(metadata.annotations[''run.googleapis.com/build-id''],metadata.annotations[''run.googleapis.com/build-image-uri''],spec.template.metadata.annotations[''run.googleapis.com/cloudsql-instances'']\)")
Bash(gcloud run services describe business-strategy-api --project velocitycso --region us-central1 --format=json)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); anns=d.get\(''metadata'',{}\).get\(''annotations'',{}\); [print\(k,''='',v\) for k,v in anns.items\(\) if ''build'' in k or ''source'' in k or ''repo'' in k]")
Bash(gcloud run services describe business-strategy-api --project velocitycso --region us-central1 --format='value\(status.traffic[0].revisionName,spec.template.metadata.name\)')
